---
title: "About Me"
---

# About Me

**Zedong Yu (于泽东)**

- 📍 Shanghai
- 💼 AD perception → AD World model & LLM agents & VLM
- 🔗 [GitHub](https://github.com/nacayu)
- 📧 Email: your.email@example.com

## Background

I am a researcher focused on Autonomous Driving perception, now transitioning to:

- AD World Model
- LLM Agents
- Vision Language Models (VLM)
